title: Banja Luka, Republika Srpska — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Banja Luka, Republika Srpska: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Banja Luka is a city in Republika Srpska with a population of 185,000. The second-largest city in Bosnia and Herzegovina and the de facto capital of Republika Srpska, known for its green boulevards, the Vrbas River, and the Kastel Fortress.

Last updated: July 15, 2026
